Welcome to your personalized Swasthya Darshika report
This detailed insight; derived trom the ancient wisdom of Nadi Pariksha and
modern wellness analytics, maps your body's rhythm, highlights imbalances,
guide to nurture harmony, and empowers you with knowledge. Use it as a
vitality; and mindful living, tailored uniquely to you:
Prakruti: Pitta Vata
blend of fire (dominant) and air elements
Your constitution is Pitta Vata, which brings together qudlities of both doshas As a
male with & normal body type; your tendencies reflect this combination-physically
mentally: You are likely to experience traits from both doshas depending on your and
litestyle, season; and stress levels Unclerstanding your prakruti helps you choose
foods; routines, and habits that support balance; health; and resilience
Vikruti: Pitta
blend of fire (dominant) and water elements
Your current Pitta imbalance; superimposed on a Vata Pitta Prakruti, suggests a need
to cool the body and mind: This imbalance can manifest as inflammation; acidity, and
heightened emotional responses like irritability, impacting your energy and digestion
Pulse Rate Rhythm Remark
Irregular Good 81

Nutritional Vitality Digestive Health Parameter Level
Digestion Level High 80% High; Your digestion is strong indicating an efficient metabolism and ability to process food well;
Toxin Level Low 20%
Low, Your toxin level is low, suggesting minimal accumulation of metabolic waste products:
Medium Hydration Level 50% hydration suggests & need to consciously increase fluid intake throughout the day: Your medium
Body Strength
Immunity Level Medium
indicating & moderate capacity to resist Illness and 40% Medium; Your immunity is at & medium level
maintain vitality.
Flexibility Level Medium
70% Medium flexibility indicates a need for regular stretching and movement to maintain joint health and
range of motion:
Mind Strength
Overthinking Level Medium
40% Medium hyperthinking indicates an active mind that can be prone to overthinking; focus techniques are
beneficial:
stress Level Medium 40% Your medium stress level requires attention to calming practices to prevent escalation

Potential Risk
Dyspepsia; Your Pitta imbalance is directly linked to digestive disturbances
Iike acidity and indigestion; which are common symptoms of dyspepsia,
Current Thyroid disorder; Pitta imbalances can affect hormonal regulation, and
thyroid function is sensitive to these imbalances; potentially leading to
disorders
Skin issues, Pitta imbalances often manifest on the skin, and without
management; this can lead to chronic issues Iike rashes or inflammation;
Future Sleep disturbance; Your Pitta imbalance, coupled with medium stress and
hyperthinking; can disrupt sleep patterns; leading to difficulty falling
asleep or restless nights
Organ Insights
Intestine; Your high digestion and low toxins indicate
a robust and efficient intestinal system
1 key Liver; The liver is a organ for detoxification; and
your low toxin levels suggest it is functioning well
Pancreas, Your strong digestive capacity points to a
well-functioning pancreas, crucial for enzyme
production
Skin; Your Pitta imbalance directly affects the skin,
making it susceptible to inflammation and rashes
Throat; Pitta imbalances can lead to inflammation,
which may affect the throat; causing irritation or a
burning sensation
Stomach; The Pitta imbalance is strongly associated
with the stomach, leading to issues like acidity and
hyperacidity

Spicy Curries, excess heat and acidity glass, cooling and aids digestion Sweet Lassi,
bowl; hydrating and Cucumber Salad, Fried Foods, heavy and increases Pitta
pacifies Pitta
Sour Fruits; increases Pitta and acidity
Moong Dal Khichdi; bowl; easy to digest and
balancing Hot Peppers; aggravates inflammation
Alcohol; dehydrating and increases Pitta Ghee; 1 teaspoon, lubricates intestines and
cools Pitta
Coffee, stimulates Pitta and can cause acidity
glass, hydrating and cooling Coconut Water;
Fermented Foods, can increase Pitta
Bitter Gourd (Karela); serving, helps reduce
excess Pitta
Mint Chutney, 1 tablespoon, cooling and aids
digestion

Yoga at Home
Bhujangasana surya Namaskar
balanced practice of Sun Salutations can help Cobra pose gently opens the chest and stimulates
manage Pitta by promoting mindful movement and the digestive organs
breath awareness
Malasana Trikonasana
Triangle pose stretches the sides and Garland pose aids in digestion and
impraves digestion elimination
Padmasana Anulom Vilom
Alternate nostril breathing is very eftective in Latus pose is excellent for meditation
balancing Pitta and vata
Exercise Outside
swimming Walking
Swimming is cooling exercise that is excellent far_ good way to stay active without Gentle walking is
pacifying Pitta without overexerting aggravating Pitta
Strength training
Jogging training Moderate strength can help build Gentle jogging can be suitable stable physique
Plank Cycling
Cycling at & moderate pace can be beneticial Plank strengthens the core and improves stability

Panchakarma
This therapy is excellent for Shirodhara
calming the pitta dosha and
reducing stress and hyperthinking
cleansing therapy can help A mild Virechana
pacify excess pitta and reduce (mild cleansing)
accumulated toxins
Nasya can help clear excess pitta Nasya
from the head region and support (nasal therapy)
respiratory and sinus health
Aromatherapy
Has cooling properties that help Sandalwood
pacify pitta and calm the mind
Can help improve focus and Rosemary
reduce mental fatigue associated
with pittas intensity
Is known for its calming effects Lavender
ad erlerar falaj edeej

FAq
What is Pulse Rate? What does it mean?
Your pulse rate of 81 bpm falls within the normal range of 70-90 bpm for your Prakruti
What is your rhythm? What does it mean? 2.
While your pulse rate is normal, it is noted as irregular: This can sometimes indicate a need for stress
management and balanced lifestyle practices
What is your toxin level? What does it mean?
Low toxin levels indicate efficient metabolic processes and minimal waste accumulation; supporting overall
health
What is your immunity level? What does it mean?
Medium immunity suggests & moderate ability to tight off infections, highlighting the need for supportive
lifestyle choices
What is your digestion level? What does it mean? 5.
High digestion signities a strong metabolic fire (Agni) , enabling effective nutrient absorption and minimal
digestive discomfort;
What is your hyperthinking level? What does it mean? 6.
Medium hyperthinking indicates an active mind that can be prone to overthinking; focus techniques are
beneficial
What is your stress level? What does it mean? 7.
Medium stress levels require proactive management through relaxation techniques to prevent negative
impacts on health:
What is your hydration level? What does it mean? 8.
bodily optimal Medium hydration suggests a need to consciously increase fluid intake to maintain functions
What is your flexibility level? What does it mean? 9.
Medium flexibility indicates a need for regular stretching and movement to maintain joint health and range of
motion:
